title: HBM-Parasitic-Pack
description: This is a small pack a made for My friend group and its hard
body:
This is a simple mod pack I made for my group



Modpack Includes 



•HBM



•SRP (Scrape and Run :Parasites)



•Compact machines 3



•Most the add-ons by NoCube For Srp



•Mystical Agriculture



Hopefully this pack is fun for someone too 



(None of these mods are my project)
